Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.label: Leman Russ Tank
Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.description:
The standard battle tank of the Imperial Guard, the Leman Russ is a rugged and dependable armored vehicle. Prioritizing heavy firepower and armor over mobility, it allows for extensive modifications, offering a high degree of combat specialization.

It is capable of mounting a variety of weapons, including a main turret weapon, a pintle-mounted gun, hull-mounted and sponson-mounted heavy weapons, along with various defensive upgrades. The tank is named after Leman Russ, the Primarch of the Space Wolves.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Driver x1, Gunner x1, Sponson Gunners x2
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel.
